name: gqtask
description: A minimalist todo list utility with tiny size.

scripts.commit: git push origin master & git push github master & git push bitbucket master & git push nodegit master
scripts.git: git add .; git commit -m "update"; echo gitted...
scripts.git:setup: git config --global user.name "username";git config --global user.email "username@gmail.com";git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/master master;

author: glidev5@gmail.com
